1. Website Technical Maintenance & SEO: (Commercial)

  • Website Platform Updates:Regularly update the Content Management System (CMS), plugins, themes, and other software components to the latest stable versions. Testing and deployment of updates in a staging environment before pushing to the live site. Backup the website database and files before updates.
  • Security Monitoring and Management:Implement and maintain security measures, including firewalls, malware scanning, and intrusion detection. Regularly monitor website security logs and address any potential vulnerabilities. Install and manage SSL certificates.
  • Performance Optimization:Monitor website loading speed and performance metrics. Optimize website code, images, and other assets for faster loading times. Implement caching mechanisms and content delivery networks (CDNs) as needed. Monitor Website uptime.
  • Database Management:Regularly backup the website database. Optimize database performance. Address database related issues.
  • Broken Link Management:Perform routine checks for broken links and correct them.

2. Content Maintenance:

  • Content Updates and Revisions:Update existing website content as needed, including text, images, videos, and other media. Ensure content accuracy and consistency. Implement SEO best practices for content updates.
  • New Content Creation and Publication:Create and publish new website content, such as blog posts, articles, and product descriptions. Format and optimize content for web display. Manage content scheduling and publishing calendars.
  • Image and Media Management:Optimize and upload images and videos for web use. Manage image and media libraries. Ensure all images and videos are properly tagged with alt text.
  • SEO Monitoring and Optimization:Monitor website search engine rankings and traffic. Implement on-page and off-page SEO strategies. Perform keyword research and analysis.
  • User Feedback and Support:Monitor website user feedback and address any issues or concerns. Provide basic website support to users.

3. Reporting and Communication:

  • Provide regular reports on website performance, security, and content updates.
  • Communicate with stakeholders regarding website maintenance activities and issues.
  • Maintain clear and organized documentation.

I. Planning & Goal Setting

  • Define Target Audience: Identify your ideal customer for this landing page.
  • Landing Page Goal: Determine the primary action you want visitors to take (e.g., contact form submission, download a white paper).
  • Keyword Research: Conduct keyword research to identify relevant terms with good search volume and low competition.

II. Content Development & Optimization

  • Compelling Headline & Subheading: Craft a clear and captivating headline that incorporates your target keyword and grabs visitor attention. Write a subheading that elaborates on the value proposition.
  • Benefits-Oriented Content: Develop engaging content that highlights the benefits of your product or service, addressing the specific needs of your target audience.
  • Strong Call to Action (CTA): Include a clear and concise CTA that encourages visitors to take the desired action.

III. On-Page SEO Optimization

  • SEO Page Title & Meta Description: Create a search-engine-friendly page title and meta description that includes your target keyword and accurately summarizes the landing page content.
  • Header Tags & Keyword Integration: Employ H1, H2, and H3 tags strategically throughout the content, naturally incorporating your target keyword and its variations.
  • Image Optimization: Optimize images for faster loading speed by resizing and using descriptive alt text with your target keyword.

IV. Wix Studio Design & Functionality

  • Landing Page Template Selection: Choose a visually appealing Wix Studio template that aligns with your brand and complements the landing page content.
  • Mobile Responsiveness: Ensure the landing page design adapts seamlessly to different devices (desktop, tablet, mobile) for optimal user experience.
  • Form Integration: Integrate a relevant form (e.g., contact form, newsletter signup) based on your landing page goal.
  • Clear Navigation: While minimalism is encouraged for landing pages, consider including minimal navigation for easy access to other relevant pages on your website.

V. Launch & Monitoring

  • Website Integration and Testing: Publish the landing page within your Wix Studio website and perform thorough testing across different devices and browsers.
  • SEO Monitoring & Analytics: Submit the landing page to search engines and utilize Wix Analytics to track visitor behavior and conversions.
  • A/B Testing (Optional): Consider A/B testing different versions of headlines, CTAs, or design elements to optimize conversion rates.

Scope of Work

Assessment and Planning

  • Conduct a full audit of the current Hostinger VPS environment (file structure, DNS, domains, subdomains, SSL certificates, database usage, cron jobs, etc.)
  • Identify dependencies and compatibility requirements.
  • Create a detailed migration plan with timelines, responsibilities, and rollback strategy.

AWS Infrastructure Setup

  • Create and configure AWS account and IAM users/roles.
  • Set up the following AWS services as needed:
  • Amazon S3: Create buckets for static asset storage.
  • Amazon EC2: Create instances for application hosting.
  • Elastic Load Balancer (ALB/NLB): Configure load balancing between EC2 instances to distribute incoming traffic.
  • Amazon Route 53: Configure DNS and domain routing.
  • AWS Certificate Manager: Install SSL/TLS certificates.
  • Amazon RDS (if needed): Migrate existing database from VPS (if the website uses MySQL/PostgreSQL/etc.).

Migration Execution

  • Export and migrate all website files and assets from Hostinger to AWS.
  • Export and import any existing databases to RDS (if applicable).
  • Configure environment variables, permissions, and bucket policies.
  • Connect EC2 instances to the Load Balancer.
  • Test the full site on staging environment before going live.

DNS & Go-Live

  • Update DNS records to point to new AWS infrastructure.
  • Final testing in production environment.
  • Monitor logs and performance post-migration.

Deliverables

  • AWS Infrastructure setup (S3, EC2, Load Balancer, Route 53, etc.)
  • Migrated website running on AWS
  • Updated DNS configuration

LMN E-Commerce Website

 

Phase 1: Project Setup and Backend Development

  1. Project Setup:Set up a new Laravel project. Configure the project environment (database, authentication, etc.). Install required dependencies (Laravel packages, Ziina payment gateway SDK).
  2. Backend Development: Product Management:Create a robust product management system to manage product information (name, description, price, images, categories, attributes, etc.). Implement features for adding, editing, and deleting products. Integrate product images and variants (e.g., size, color). Category and Attribute Management:Create a hierarchical category system to organize products. Implement attribute management to define product variations (e.g., size, color, material). User Management:Implement user registration, login, and profile management. Implement roles and permissions for different user types (admin, customer). Order Management:Develop a comprehensive order management system to track orders from placement to delivery. Implement features for order confirmation, payment processing, shipping, and tracking. Integrate with the Ziina payment gateway for secure payment processing. Inventory Management:Implement inventory tracking to monitor stock levels and manage low-stock alerts. CRM Integration:Develop a CRM system inspired by Shopify's backend, providing features like customer management, order history, and analytics.

Phase 2: Frontend Development

  1. Frontend Design and Development:Design and develop a user-friendly and visually appealing frontend using modern web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Implement a responsive design to ensure optimal user experience across different devices. Develop a seamless checkout process, including guest checkout and account creation. Implement a robust search and filtering system to help users find products easily. Create a visually appealing product page, showcasing product details, images, and customer reviews. Design and implement a user-friendly cart and checkout process.

Phase 3: Testing and Deployment

  1. Testing:Conduct thorough unit, integration, and functional testing to identify and fix bugs. Perform security testing to ensure the application is protected against vulnerabilities. Conduct performance testing to optimize the website's speed and responsiveness.
  2. Deployment:Deploy the website to a production server, ensuring optimal performance and security. Configure the server environment (web server, database server, etc.). Implement a deployment strategy to streamline the deployment process.

I. Project Overview

This scope outlines the services provided for online Public Relations (PR) distribution of your original article to a target audience of over 2,000 online news websites.

Please note: Distributing an article to such a vast number of websites with guaranteed placement is unlikely. However, we can leverage various strategies to maximize the reach and potential pick-up of your article by relevant online publications.

II. Pre-Distribution

  • Article Review & Optimization: We'll review your article for newsworthiness, relevance to target audiences, and adherence to journalistic standards.
  • Target Audience & Media List Development: We'll collaborate with you to define your target audience and develop a comprehensive media list comprising relevant online news websites, industry publications, and blogs with a good domain authority.
  • Press Release Creation (Optional): We can craft a compelling press release summarizing your article's key points to generate media interest.

III. Online PR Distribution Strategy

  • Press Release Distribution Services (Optional): We can utilize paid press release distribution services to disseminate your press release (if created) to a wide network of online media outlets.
  • Media Outreach & Pitching: We'll conduct personalized email outreach to journalists, editors, and bloggers on your target media list, pitching your article and highlighting its newsworthy aspects.
  • Social Media Promotion: We'll promote your article on your social media channels to generate additional online buzz and potential media attention.

IV. Reporting & Monitoring

  • Distribution Report: We'll provide a comprehensive report detailing the media outlets contacted, the number of pitches sent, and any secured placements.
  • Brand Mention Monitoring: We'll monitor online mentions of your brand and article to gauge the overall impact of the PR campaign.

Campaign Overview

  • Campaign Duration: April 6 – May 10 (5 weeks)

  • Objective: Drive qualified high-net-worth leads for Sobha’s Dubai property showcase

Primary Channel: Meta (Facebook & Instagram)

Additional Channel: YouTube (secondary rollout)
Lead Flow: Landing page → Registration form → Client follow-up and RSVP confirmation

Campaign Strategy

  • Ad Set Structure: One ad set with three creatives (same messaging, different personalities)
  • Campaign Objective: Landing Page Views
  • Target Audience: HNWIs in Lagos, 30+, with interest in luxury real estate, finance, and investment
  • Formats: Reels and 16:9 (rotated for efficiency)
  • Geographic Expansion (Week 2–3): Abuja and Port Harcourt

Retargeting: From Week 3 onward, target video viewers, form openers, and website visitors

Included Services (Management Fee: AED 2,500)

  • Campaign Management
  • Daily Lead Management
  • Weekly Analytics and Reporting
  • Campaign & Asset Creation

Media Budget Recommendation

  • Budget Range: AED 5,000–7,000
  • Based on estimated CPL in Nigeria of AED 40–60 for luxury investment property leads
  • To meet an 80-person event capacity, we aim to generate 100–120 high-intent leads, considering drop-off and qualification rates
  • Budget to be deducted from the card associated to client's account.

TikTok Note

TikTok currently does not support targeting Nigeria for this campaign. Therefore, we will focus on Meta (Facebook & Instagram) and YouTube for lead generation.
